\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5628 introduces Stress-Energy Tensor as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}

\(H_{\text{ER}} = \int_\Sigma \sqrt{|g|}\,R^{\mu\nu} T_{\mu\nu}\,d^4x\)
\]
